session_summary: Observation-title filtering fixture for Phase 6 extractor coverage.

user_prompts.prompt: Suppress blank observation headings before rendering.

observations.narrative: Blank observation title should never create a generic heading.

observations.title: Observation
observations.narrative: Generic placeholder titles should be suppressed before the template renders headings.
Whitespace-only observation titles should also be suppressed.

observations.title: Real extractor signal
observations.narrative: A substantive observation title should still render normally after the generic-title filter lands.

filesModified.changes_summary: Filter generic non-decision observation titles before rendering.
